en: He said that he was tired.
She told me that she lived in Beijing.
He said that he liked music.

zh: 她告诉我她已经完成了作业。
en: She told me that she had finished her homework.

zh: 他说他昨天去了图书馆。
en: He said that he had gone to the library the day before.
She said that she would come to the party.

zh: 他告诉我他正在学习钢琴。
en: He told me that he was learning the piano.
She said that she did not like vegetables.
He told me that he could swim.
She said that she had to go home early.
He asked me if I liked music.

zh: 她问我是否完成了作业。
en: She asked me if I had finished my homework.

zh: 老师问我们是否理解了。
en: The teacher asked us if we had understood.

zh: 他问我是否会来参加派对。
en: He asked me if I would come to the party.

zh: 她问我是否见过那部电影。
en: She asked me if I had seen that film.
He asked me where I lived.
She asked me what my name was.

zh: 老师问我们为什么迟到了。
en: The teacher asked us why we were late.
He asked me when I would come back.
She asked me how to get to the station.
He told me to close the door.
The teacher told us to be quiet.
She told me not to worry.
He told me to come early.
Mum told me to do my homework.
He said the weather was nice that day.
She said she would come the next day.
He said he had gone to Shanghai the week before.

zh: 她说这里的食物很好吃。
en: She said the food there was delicious.

zh: 他告诉我那本书是他写的。
en: He told me that he had written that book.
